summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for 4 new engines: Blueprint Generation, System Diagnostics, Platform Settings, and AI Orchestration. All 39 tests passed (100% success rate). All 17 backend engines are operational.

minor.issue: Requires trailing slash (/api/blueprints/) - without it returns 401. This is a FastAPI routing quirk.

Authentication flow works correctly with JWT tokens
Blueprint Generation Engine: Supports screen, page, flow, data_model, navigation, full_app, component types
System Diagnostics Engine: Health checks, integrity checks, logs, errors, metrics all working
Platform Settings Engine: User settings, global settings, bulk updates, validation all working
All endpoints properly require authentication (return 401 without token)
Settings validation correctly rejects invalid values (type, range)
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with unique emails for each test class
